macros.token: #set file_paths = [] #if str($repeat.software_cond.input) != "None" #set $at_least_one_input="T" #for $file in $repeat.software_cond.input: @ESCAPE_IDENTIFIER@ #set safe_id = str($identifier).replace(" ", "_") #set file_path = os.path.join($software_dir, $safe_id + '.sexdeterrmine.json') #if $file_path in $file_paths #set $file_path += '_' + str($file_paths.count($file_path)) #end if #set $file_paths += [$file_path] python -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); meta=d.pop('Metadata', {'tool_name': 'Sex.DetERRmine'}); k=list(d.keys())[0]; data=d[k]; out={'Metadata': meta, sys.argv[3]: data}; json.dump(out, open(sys.argv[2], 'w'), indent=4)" '$file' '$file_path' '$safe_id' && cp '$file_path' '${software_dir}/sexdeterrmine.json' && #end for #end if
